title: 沉浸时光：繁茂与远界 (Immersive Era: Verdant & Distant Horizons)
description:
A hundred types of communities are renewed, a thousand tasks begin, starting a magical adventure journey.
百种群系焕新，千项任务启程，开启奇幻冒险之旅。
body:
核心理念： 沉浸、探索与极致性能
欢迎来到《沉浸时光：繁茂与远界》，这是一份专为追求极致视觉体验与深度内容扩展的冒险家打造的整合包。本整合包不仅仅是一个简单的Mod集合，而是一次对Minecraft世界的深度重塑。我们旨在通过顶尖的光影技术、海量的结构扩展以及全方位的性能优化，为你打造一个既广阔无垠又细节满满的沉浸式世界。
1. 视觉与光影的革命
整合包的核心视觉体验由 Rubidium（Rubidium） 提供强大的渲染支持，配合 Embeddium 和 Oculus，为你带来电影级的光影效果。配合 Distant Horizons，你将解锁前所未有的视距，亲眼见证地平线的尽头，让广袤的群系不再受限于视野。GeckoLib 则为世界注入了灵魂，让生物与动画栩栩如生。
2. 世界的深度重塑与探索
这个世界充满了惊喜与未知。得益于 Yung's API 系列模组，从幽深的洞穴（Yung's Better Caves）到深海的遗迹（Yung's Better Ocean Monuments），从幽暗的下界要塞（Yung's Better Nether Fortresses）到空旷的末地岛屿（Yung's Better End Island），每一个维度都经过了精心重制，结构更加合理，探索乐趣倍增。
TerraBlender 确保了新旧群系的完美融合，而 Stacked Blocks 系列与 Advanced Netherite 则为你的建筑与装备库增添了现代与奇幻交织的色彩。
3. 味蕾与生活的盛宴
生活不仅仅是战斗与挖掘。Farmer's Delight（舒适的美食） 与 Stacked Blocks Farmers Delight 彻底改变了生存的烹饪系统，让你在灶台前也能体验到烹饪的乐趣。RamadanDelight 与 Aquaculture（水产业）、OceansDelight 等模组进一步丰富了食材库，从沙漠的特色美食到深海的渔获，让你的餐桌永远充满新鲜感。IMBlocker 则贴心地为你屏蔽了不必要的干扰，让你专注于沉浸式的体验。
4. 极致的性能优化
为了支撑如此庞大的模组规模，我们引入了 FerriteCore、ModernFix、ModernUI 以及 Memory Leak Fix 等一系列硬核优化模组。EntityCulling（实体剔除）与 ImmediatelyFast 进一步释放了硬件潜力，确保即便在加载了高细节资源包和复杂光影的情况下，游戏依然能保持丝滑流畅的帧数。
立即启程，开启你的沉浸时光！
在这个由 Nature's Compass 指引方向，由 Comforts 提供安眠之所的世界里，每一次挖掘、每一次烹饪、每一次远眺地平线，都将成为你难忘的冒险回忆。



Core Concept: Immersion, Exploration, and Ultimate Performancesxsd


Welcome to 'Immersive Time: Flourish and Distant Realms,' a package designed for adventurers seeking the ultimate visual experience and in-depth content expansion. This package is not just a simple collection of mods, but a profound reshaping of the Minecraft world. Our goal is to create an immersive world that is both vast and richly detailed through top-tier lighting technology, massive structural expansions, and comprehensive performance optimizations.


1. Revolution of Vision and Lighting
The core visual experience of the integration pack is powered by Rubidium, providing strong rendering support, paired with Embeddium and Oculus to bring you cinematic lighting effects. With Distant Horizons, you will unlock unprecedented draw distances, witnessing the ends of the horizon and allowing vast galactic systems to no longer be limited by your view. GeckoLib injects soul into the world, making creatures and animations come alive.

2. The Deep Reshaping and Exploration of the World
This world is full of surprises and the unknown. Thanks to Yung's API series of mods, from the deep caves (Yung's Better Caves) to the underwater monuments (Yung's Better Ocean Monuments), from the dim Nether fortresses (Yung's Better Nether Fortresses) to the vast End islands (Yung's Better End Island), each dimension has been carefully remade, with more logical structures and greatly enhanced exploration enjoyment.
TerraBlender ensures the perfect integration of new and old biomes, while the Stacked Blocks series and Advanced Netherite add a color of modernity intertwined with fantasy to your buildings and equipment.

4. Ultimate Performance Optimization
To support such a massive mod scale, we have introduced a series of hardcore optimization mods, including FerriteCore, ModernFix, ModernUI, and Memory Leak Fix. EntityCulling and ImmediatelyFast further unleash hardware potential, ensuring that even when high-detail resource packs and complex lighting are loaded, the game can still maintain smooth and silky frame rates.
Set off immediately and start your immersive time!
In this world guided by Nature's Compass and provided a place to rest by Comforts, every mining, every cooking, every gaze at the horizon will become an unforgettable adventure memory.
